'''Laait''' was a [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] relayed to Supreme Commander Laait that the flotilla he sent to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] had encountered living vessels, and instructed Laait to inform [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]]. Laait summoned Shimrra from his "meditation" with the gods, much to the Supreme Overlord's dismay. Despite Shimrra's threatening tone, Laait relayed the information, which stirred much confusion in the [[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|Elites]]. It was unknown if he survived the liberation of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
